tool_calls.input: {"code":"const prs = github.list_pull_requests({ state: \"open\" });\nconst byRepo = prs.reduce((m, p) => { m[p.repo] = (m[p.repo] || 0) + 1; return m; }, {});\n({ total: prs.length, byRepo })"}
